violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
Handwashing sink is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024
Prep unit located in the prep area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 58DF. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

The floors, walls, doors, and prep units throughout the mobile establishment have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024
